name: Source callee signatures
description: Durable callee-to-atom mappings extracted from the Parallax reference engine rules tables.

signatures.notes: child_process shell entry points; pairs with gate.exec.shell.javascript.child-process to drop RegExp.exec and local-helper false positives when no child_process evidence is present.

Extracted from _LANG_RULES.r. Split from the base-mode rule: base compares only the last '.'-segment, so R's dotted 'download.file' reduced to 'file' and never matched. Exact mode matches the full normalized callee.
Extracted from _LANG_RULES.r. 'url' stays base to match R's url() connection opener (incl. namespaced calls).
